hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.css|*.json) npx --yes prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null;; esac; } || true

git diff --cached --diff-filter=ACM --name-only | xargs grep -lnE '(BEEHIIV_API_KEY|api[_-]?key|secret[_-]?key|token|password|private[_-]?key)\s*[:=]\s*["'\''a-zA-Z0-9]' 2>/dev/null && echo 'BLOCKED: Potential secret detected in staged files. Review before pushing.' && exit 1 || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */messages.ts) node -e "const m=require('./src/i18n/messages.ts')||{}; const en=Object.keys(JSON.stringify(m.messages?.en||{})); const es=Object.keys(JSON.stringify(m.messages?.es||{})); if(en.length!==es.length) console.log('WARNING: i18n keys may be out of sync between EN and ES')" 2>/dev/null;; esac; } || true
